## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes in every affected package (`frontend`, `signaling`, `mcp-server`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in every affected package
- [ ] Changes to the wire protocol were made in `shared/protocol.ts` (the single source of truth), not in a generated `_shared/` copy
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior or configuration changed
